---
pagetitle: "Third Foundation"
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
editor: source
sidebar: false
search: false
repo-actions: false
lang: es
description: | 
  A showcase for ideas in several fields in robotics, research writing, programming, and so forth since a modern perspective aimed to students and enthusiasts.
image: images/twitter-card.png
listing:
  - id: latest-content
    contents: 
    - /blogs
    - /ideas
    - "!index.qmd"
    # - "!b3_1.qmd" Articulo que debe ignorarse ya que esta en el banner principal
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false
  - id: ideas
    contents: 
    - /ideas
    - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false
toc: false
---
<!-- ::: {.content-container}
::: {.top-story .purple-background}
<a href="/ideas/posts/2024/05/14/ai-series-2.qmd">

::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .top-story-text}
While AI algorithms can pose a number of challenges in terms of the size and sophistication of the algorithms, ethical issues can be the hardest and most important aspect to get right. Olivia Varley-Winter looks at why ethical considerations need to come first when working with AI and what this means. 
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8 .top-story-img}
![](ideas/posts/2024/05/14/images/Eleanor_Roosevelt-991724.jpg)
:::
:::

</a>

:::
::: -->

<!-- <div class="animate-title" style="justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
  <h1>The cat and the hat.</h1>
</div> -->

<!-- <div class="animate__animated animate__bounce" style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 20vh; text-align: center;">
  <h1>Bienvenido a The Third Foundation</h1>
</div> -->

::: {.content-container}
```{=html}
<div class="center">
  <div class="typewriter">
  
    <h1 class="custom-font">Third Foundation</h1>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.header-text} 
::: {.content-container}
::: {.header-block}
Bienvenido a este nuevo proyecto dedicado a proporcionar información valiosa y servir como una vitrina de ideas en varios campos como la robótica, redacción de investigaciones, programación y más, desde una perspectiva moderna dirigida a estudiantes y entusiastas. Al igual que la *Primera y Segunda Fundación* en las novelas de [Isaac Asimov](https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Asimov), este espacio (*Bóveda*) busca recopilar diversos proyectos y fundamentos impulsado por el rápido crecimiento de la IA en los últimos años en la web.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="latest-content.qmd">

## Último contenido 
</a>

::: {#latest-content}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.pullout-text}
::: {.pullout-container}
::: {.pullout-block .black-background}
![](images/blue-quote.png){width="100px"}

## But can I do it? Won’t the Laws of Robotics hold me back. No, they will not hold me back. I know they won’t.

## There is something far more important to me than they are, something that dictates my actions beyond anything they can do to stop me.

## I want to be a writer.
El Robot Cal (CL-123X) en *Gold The Final Science Fiction Collection*, **Isaac Asimov (1983)**

::: {.button}
[Léelo completo en Novel12](https://novel12.com/243245/gold-the-final-science-fiction-collection-.htm)
:::

:::
:::
:::

<!-- ::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="viewpoints/index.qmd">

## Viewpoints 
</a>

::: {#viewpoints}
:::

:::
::: -->

<!-- ::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="case-studies/index.qmd">

## Case Studies
</a> 

::: {#case-studies}
:::

:::
::: -->

::: {.pullout-text}
::: {.pullout-container}
::: {.pullout-block .black-background}
![](images/orange-quote.png){width="100px"}

## Mis (Ebling Mis) said, in a hoarse whisper, “I am convinced the Second Foundation can win, if it is not caught prematurely by the Mule. It has kept itself secret; the secrecy must be upheld; it has a purpose. You must go there; your information is vital . . . may make all the difference. Do you hear me?”

## Toran cried in near-agony, “Yes, yes! Tell us how to get there, Ebling? Where is it?” “I can tell you,” said the faint voice.

## He never did [Bayta lifted her blaster and shot].
*Fundación e Imperio* - **Isaac Asimov (1952)**

::: {.button}
[Léelo completo en Novel12](https://novel12.com/241030/foundation-and-empire.htm)
:::

:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="ideas/index.qmd">

## Ideas
</a> 

::: {#ideas}
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ::: {.content-container}
::: {.listing-block}
<a href="careers/index.qmd">

## Careers 
</a>

::: {#careers}
:::

:::
::: -->

::: {.footer-text}
::: {.footer-container .blue-background}
::: {.footer-block}
::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
### Publicado por
![](images/logo_ThirdFoundation_white.png){fig-align="left"}
:::
<!-- ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
### Our partners
[![](images/asa-footer-new.png){fig-align="left"}](https://www.amstat.org/)
::: -->
<!-- ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
### With support from 
[![](images/ati-footer-new.png){fig-align="left"}](https://www.turing.ac.uk/)
::: -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
### Sobre
[La página](about-ttf.qmd)\
[El autor](about-me.qmd)
:::
<!-- ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
### Contribute
[Call for contributions](/contributor-docs/call-for-contributions.qmd)\
[Contributor guidelines](/contributor-docs/contributor-guidelines.qmd)\
[Style guide](/contributor-docs/style-guide.qmd)
::: -->


<!-- ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-12}
### Our partners
logos to go here

Remember, images used as thumbnails for article listings must be set to 991px(w) x 724px(h).
::: -->

:::
:::
:::
:::
